titleStmt.title: SII 41.150: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 150. (A.R. No. 149 of 1905.) Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr, Karur Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vikritisvara temple at Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr.

summary.p: The king assigned the village of Nandaṉūr with all its taxes. The officers Vilāḍattaraiyaṉ and Kāḍuveṭṭi signed the royal order.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . konerimaiy
koṇṭāṉ Āḷuṭaiyār
tiruveñcamākkūṭal Āḷuṭai
yārdevarkaṉmikaḷukku nam Olai kuṭutta
paricāvatu nantaṉūrai tiruveñcamākkū
ṭal Āḷuṭaiyārkku kuṭuttom Ivvūr
kku Ellaiyāvatu vaṭapāl kaḷaṉai maṭaiyum
melpāl Āyilappāḻiyum kīḻpāl nāṭukāṇi
meṭum tenpāl pottaippāḻiyum Iṉṉāṉ
kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa puṟṟutteṟṟiyuṭumpoṭi
āmai tavaḻi meṉokkiya maramum kīḻnokkiya kiṇa
ṟum Āḷuṭaiyār tiruveñcamākkūṭal Āḷuṭai
yārkku kuṭuttom Ivvūrāluḷḷa Iṟaipuravu cittā
yam Elavai yukavai maṟṟum Eppeṟpayiṟp paṭṭa
ituvum maṉṟupāṭu teṇṭa kuṟṟamum kaṟṟuppul
pokā muṟṟūṭṭum Āḷuṭaiyār tiruveñcamākkū
ṭal Āḷuṭaiyāṟkuk kuṭuttom nantamārāṉārum
pāṟpaṭuttuk kuṭukka Ippaṭikku Ivvo
laiyil nam Eḻuttu Iṭṭuk kuṭuttom Ip
paṭikku cantirātittavaṟc celvatākac cempi
lum cilai(i)yilum veṭṭikkoḷka
ippaṭikku Ivai vilāṭattaraiyaṉ E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻu
ttu Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai§
Digital edition of SII 41.150 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
